description_long: This object features two stylized ghost-like dolls, one larger and white and the other smaller and blue, both with rounded, smooth bodies and large, expressive black eyes with white highlights and pink cheeks. Each doll has a pair of simple, brown legs ending in oversized pink shoes, giving them a playful and cartoonish appearance. The dolls are positioned on a flat, circular black base, with the smaller blue doll sitting in front of the larger white one. The surface of the dolls is smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a plastic or vinyl material. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible seams or joints, and the color palette is dominated by white, blue, pink, and black. The dolls' faces are friendly and inviting, making them suitable for display or play in urban environments such as parks or playgrounds.
description: Two cute, ghost-like dolls—one white and one blue—stand and sit together on a black circular base, each with big eyes, pink cheeks, and pink shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing both dolls' faces, with the smaller blue doll sitting in front of the larger white doll, both displaying their large eyes and pink shoes.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the profile of both dolls, showing the depth of their bodies and the arrangement of their legs and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of both dolls and the circular base, with the white doll's body mostly obscuring the blue doll.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the side profiles of both dolls, emphasizing the rounded shapes and the placement of the legs and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: The dolls wear oversized pink shoes and have no visible clothing, with their bodies resembling simple, smooth ghost costumes in white and blue.
attribute_pose: The larger doll stands upright with legs apart, while the smaller doll sits with legs extended forward; both have arms hidden beneath their rounded bodies.
attribute_facial_expression: Both dolls have a neutral, friendly expression with wide, round eyes, small pink cheeks, and no visible mouth or eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; both dolls have smooth, rounded heads.
